title: Welcome to Jinx Pet Hub
excerpt: Jinx Pet Hub is officially live — a cozy corner for pet education and a personal blog following Jinx the hamster.
content:
Hi there, and welcome to Jinx Pet Hub.

This little corner of the internet is a place for pet lovers — especially those who adore small animals. Whether you have a cat, a hamster, a guinea pig, a rabbit, or you're just curious about them, you're in the right place.

The hub has a full animal section where you can explore breeds, read about the history of each species, and find links to trusted care resources. It's meant to be a calm, educational space — friendly and well-researched.

And then there's this blog. This is where things get personal. I'll be documenting life with Jinx, my hamster, sharing photos, updates, and probably a lot of stories about wheel-running at 3am.

Jinx is a Syrian hamster with a very big personality and very small paws. She came into my life and turned me into a full-on hamster nerd almost immediately. I hope you enjoy following along.

Stay cozy.
